column5: POST /auth/login with {"username":"alice","password":"alice12345"}
column8: Assert: 200; JSON has token (≥32 chars, random-looking) and "role":"admin"

column5: Login fails (bad password)
column8: Assert: 401 and application/problem+json body type ends /unauthorized

column5:
Token required on protected route: 
Test: GET /alerts with no Authorization header

Operator access allowed: 
Test: log in as bob, then GET /alerts with Bearer <token>

Operator access denied (role escalation): 
Test: bob token on POST /auth/assign-role

Admin assigns role: 
Test: alice token, POST /auth/assign-role {"username":"user","role":"operator"}
column8: Assert: 204 and login as user returns operator role

column5:
Admin cannot drop own admin: 
Test: alice token tries to set role=operator for alice

List turbines public: 
Test: GET /turbines

Live status:
Test: Upstream healthy; GET /turbines/1/status
column8: Assert: freshness:"live" at root and for every property

column5:
Cached fallback:
Test: Simulate upstream timeout; GET /turbines/1/status
column8: Assert: freshness:"cached"; values unchanged from previous live call

column5:
Missing property handling:
Test: Upstream returns temperature:null; GET /turbines/1/status

Unknown turbine:
Test: GET /turbines/999/status

Valid pitch/yaw:
Test: bob token, POST /turbines/1/control {"pitch":10,"yaw":180}
column8: Assert: 200 {status:"success"}; /turbines/1/actions newest item type:"control" with given values

column5:
Range validation:
Test: pitch = -120
column8: Assert: 400 Problem+JSON with field error for pitch

column5:
Valid state transition:
Test: shutdown then start sequence using correct endpoints
column8: Assert: each returns 200; turbine status updates accordingly

column5:
Invalid transition:
Test: POST /turbines/1/maintenance while status = started

High-RPM alert fires:
Test: mock rpm = 70; fetch status

Alert deduplication:
Test: repeat fetch while rpm still mocked to be 70
column8: Assert: still one HighRPM alert record (no duplicates)

column5:
Alert resolves:
Test: rpm above 70, fetch status, rpm drops to 50; fetch status
column8: Assert: alert for HighRPM with status:"resolved"

column5:
Acknowledge:
Test: POST /alerts/{id}/ack as bob

Initial fetch & parse:
Test: alice token, GET /turbines/1/logs
column8: Assert: 200; JSON entries ≤ 1000, sorted oldest→newest, each entry has level,timestamp,message

column5:
No duplicates on second fetch:
Test: GET /turbines/1/logs repeatedly
column8: Assert: entry count unchanged; first entry timestamps identical

column5:
Level filter:
Test: GET /turbines/1/logs?levels=error,warning

Message substring filter
Test: GET /turbines/1/logs?message=wind

Upstream failure fallback:
Test: simulate 500 from external logs; request logs
